{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.4": 4, "RX.1": 2, "RX.3": 4, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 3},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The critique identifies relevant prior work but doesn't fully articulate the novelty of QuPPL compared to systems like Gen or Pyro.",
    "RX.1": "The critique acknowledges some related work but doesn't explicitly discuss how QuPPL handles uncertainty disclosure differently.",
    "RX.3": "The critique accurately assesses the scope of the related work and identifies relevant gaps.",
    "RX.4": "The critique demonstrates a good understanding of potential harms in this domain and correctly identifies QuPPL as avoiding them.",
    "RX.5": "The critique touches on the importance of provenance but doesn't delve into the specifics of how QuPPL handles it."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.4": 0.8, "RX.1": 0.6, "RX.3": 0.9, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.7},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The critique identifies relevant prior work but doesn't fully articulate the novelty of QuPPL compared to systems like Gen or Pyro.
rationale.RX.1: The critique acknowledges some related work but doesn't explicitly discuss how QuPPL handles uncertainty disclosure differently.
rationale.RX.3: The critique accurately assesses the scope of the related work and identifies relevant gaps.
rationale.RX.4: The critique demonstrates a good understanding of potential harms in this domain and correctly identifies QuPPL as avoiding them.
rationale.RX.5: The critique touches on the importance of provenance but doesn't delve into the specifics of how QuPPL handles it.
